## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature (parser, output format, CLI flag, etc.)

## How to test

<!-- Steps to verify the change -->

```bash
pip install -e ".[dev]"
pytest
codegraph . --print compact
```

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`pytest`)
- [ ] I added tests for new behavior (if applicable)
- [ ] I updated docs (README / CONTRIBUTING / INTEGRATION) if user-facing behavior changed
